completion_scope: continuation decision recorded; migrations restored; override recreate executed; disposable DB created with required comment; migration 001 failed on missing role postgres and rolled back; host port 55432 unbound; T054 incomplete

runtime_result.migration_001_failing_statement: grant usage on schema platform_private to postgres;

failure.assessment: Authorized continuation restored migration sources, recreated Postgres with override, and created disposable database platform_foundation_hcp03 with the required comment. Migration 001 fails closed because it grants to role postgres, which does not exist in the supabase/postgres image (supabase_admin is the superuser). HostConfig records 127.0.0.1:55432 but NetworkSettings did not publish the port and host TCP to 55432 failed. No invented ROLE postgres was created and no second recreate was performed.
failure.recovery: Preserve container, volumes, restored migrations, and empty disposable database. Obtain an exact HCP-03/HCP-04 amendment authorizing (1) a minimal precondition CREATE ROLE postgres (or equivalent peer-map/grant target correction that does not rewrite migration SQL beyond reviewed text) before re-applying migrations 001-003, and (2) one additional Postgres-only override recreate or equivalent bounded port-publish repair to make 127.0.0.1:55432 reachable, then refresh attestation and finish T054 gates.

result.next_required_action: Exact HCP-03/HCP-04 amendment for postgres role precondition and host-port publish repair
